title: Trisetaria airoides

intro: Trisetaria airoides, also known as Airo's hair grass, is a perennial plant species belonging to the Poaceae family. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine to treat various health issues, including respiratory problems, such as bronchitis and asthma, due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties. The bioactive constituents of Trisetaria airoides include flavonoids, phenolic acids, and terpenoids, which contribute to its medicinal properties.
